channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: ❌ REMOVED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 2ec40fb7-0838-470f-a644-a574aa191e92
Display name: ResourceBuilder Contributor
Description: Provides access to Resource Builder Control Plane Operations
Link: https://management.azure.com/2ec40fb7-0838-470f-a644-a574aa191e92?api-version=2022-04-01
